title: I Am the Turning Point in My Family's Money Story
subtitle: An affirmation for standing at the point where the inherited money story changes for good
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 77 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names you as the turning point: the person through whom a new era of freedom, wisdom, and wealth begins and ripples forward.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 77 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning when you want to mark and hold the sense of being the person through whom the family money story changes.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 77 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 77 centres on claiming a new wealthy family story. The statement names you as the turning point: the person through whom a new era begins and ripples forward.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice whether it lands as a fact or as something still being proved.
A new era of freedom, wisdom, and wealth begins through me and ripples through every generation after.
Adapted from the Day 77 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
